[e][h]Brawl Stars Championship 2026: February East Asia Monthly Finals
League Information
Series:
Brawl Stars Championship 2026
Organizers:
Supercell
BLAST
Server:
Tokyo
Game:
Brawl Stars
Type:
Online
Location:
 East Asia
Format:
Single-elimination
Prize Pool:
$40,000 USD
Date:
2026-02-14
Teams:
8
Liquipedia Tier:
A-Tier 
Links
Chronology
March Monthly Finals

About

[edit]

Broadcast Talent

[edit]
  • English Commentators:
    •  Ark
    •  Kenny (Kenny Barlow)
    •  Sunny (Dilana)
    •  Trav (Declan Traviss)
  • Portuguese Commentators:
    •  BrunoClash (Bruno Veiga Lopes)
    •  King Joe
  • French Commentators:
    •  Kuzan
    •  PiouPiouLover (Enzo)
  • Japanese Commentators:
    •  Kuroebi (Kunisato Ebie)
    •  Nidosan
  • Korean Commentator:
    •  Siro (Jehyun Park)
  • Chinese Commentator:
    •  Chun (Jian Sheng)

Format

[edit]
  • Qualified are 8 teams from Monthly Qualifier
  • Single-elimination bracket
  • All matches are Bo5xBo3

Prize Pool

[edit]
$40,000 USD are spread among the participants as seen below:
